CREATE DICTIONARY my_dict AS (key1 VARCHAR, value1 INTEGER);
INSERT INTO my_dict (key1, value1) VALUES ('a', 1), ('b', 2), ('c', 3);
SELECT dict_to_vector(my_dict) AS vector_output;
CREATE DICTIONARY my_empty_dict AS (key2 VARCHAR, value2 INTEGER);
SELECT dict_to_vector(my_empty_dict) AS empty_vector_output;
INSERT INTO my_dict (key1, value1) VALUES ('d', 4);
SELECT dict_to_vector(my_dict) AS extended_vector_output;
CREATE DICTIONARY shared_dict AS (key3 VARCHAR, value3 FLOAT);
INSERT INTO shared_dict (key3, value3) VALUES ('x', 0.1), ('y', 0.2);
SELECT dict_to_vector(shared_dict) AS shared_vector_output; SELECT dict_to_vector(shared_dict) AS second_shared_vector_output;
SELECT dict_to_vector(my_dict) AS dict_output WHERE dict_output IS NOT NULL;
CREATE DICTIONARY new_dict AS (key4 VARCHAR, value4 BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO new_dict (key4, value4) VALUES ('true', TRUE), ('false', FALSE);
SELECT dict_to_vector(new_dict) AS bool_vector_output;
CREATE DICTIONARY nested_dict AS (key5 VARCHAR, value5 ARRAY);
INSERT INTO nested_dict (key5, value5) VALUES ('nested_key', ARRAY[1, 2, 3]);
SELECT dict_to_vector(nested_dict) AS nested_vector_output;
CREATE DICTIONARY destructive_dict AS (key6 VARCHAR, value6 INTEGER);
INSERT INTO destructive_dict (key6, value6) VALUES ('m', 5), ('n', 6);
SELECT dict_to_vector(destructive_dict) AS destructive_vector_output; DELETE FROM destructive_dict;
SELECT dict_to_vector(destructive_dict) AS post_destructive_output;
